ns0:entry.ns0:title: AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
Language: go
Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
DeepSeek-Compatible Middleware Interface: A technical exploration project in Go, focusing on high-concurrency protocol adaptation. It serves as a reference implementation for converting diverse web protocols into standardized formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Infisical/agent-vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Infisical/agent-vault
Language: go
A HTTP credential proxy and vault for AI agents like Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes, custom agents + harnesses, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apernet/hysteria
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apernet/hysteria
Language: go
Hysteria is a powerful, lightning fast and censorship resistant proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudreve/cloudreve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudreve/cloudreve
Language: go
🌩 Self-hosted file management and sharing system, supports multiple storage providers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: compozy/compozy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/compozy/compozy
Language: go
Drive the full lifecycle of AI-assisted development — from idea to shipped code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitleaks/gitleaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks
Language: go
Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 An orchestration engine for background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
Language: go
agent-sandbox enables easy management of isolated, stateful, singleton workloads, ideal for use cases like AI agent runtimes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ltaoo/wx_channels_download
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ltaoo/wx_channels_download
Language: go
微信视频号下载器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moonD4rk/HackBrowserData
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moonD4rk/HackBrowserData
Language: go
Extract and decrypt browser data, supporting multiple data types, runnable on various operating systems (macOS, Windows, Linux).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pranshuparmar/witr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pranshuparmar/witr
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sartoopjj/thefeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sartoopjj/thefeed
Language: go
DNS-based feed reader for Telegram channels and public X accounts. Designed for environments where only DNS queries work.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: syncthing/syncthing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing
Language: go
